text.title: A Theatrical Experience Worth Waiting For
text.intro:
Live! The Women Who Made Us™ is a bold new theatrical concert celebrating the voices that shaped generations. From powerhouse vocals to unforgettable ballads, this show blends the thrill of a world tour with the intimacy of live theatre.
We are creating something truly special for you. A celebration of icons, stories, and music that will stay with you long after the curtain falls.
text.ctaTitle: Be the First to Hear More
text.ctaDescription: Sign up to learn more about this groundbreaking experience.
text.legalText: Live! The Women Who Made Us™. All Rights Reserved. A Planni Entertainment Production By Sandra Salcedo Lacouture. Trademark registered
